testcase.name: draw_boxplot_works_when_there_are_duplicate_labels_in_gene_spec
testcase.failure: Snapshot of `testcase` to 'draw_boxplot/draw-boxplot-with-duplicate-labels.svg' has changed * Download and unzip run artifact * Copy 'tests/testthat/_snaps/draw_boxplot/draw-boxplot-with-duplicate-labels.new.svg' to local test directory * Run `testthat::snapshot_review('draw_boxplot/')` to review changes Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─vdiffr::expect_doppelganger(...) at test-draw_boxplot.R:12:3 2. ├─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 3. └─testthat::expect_snapshot_file(...)

testcase.name: draw_libsize_densities_works_as_expected
